hero.title: Awaken Your Spirit
hero.subtitle: Authentic Ayahuasca ceremonies in the heart of the Amazon. Transform your life with ancestral wisdom.

about.title: Who We Are
about.subtitle: Guardians of Ancestral Medicine
about.description: We are a spiritual healing center dedicated to preserving and sharing the sacred traditions of the Amazon. Our facilitators have over 15 years of experience in ayahuasca ceremonies.
about.mission_text: To accompany each person in their healing and consciousness expansion process with respect, safety and love.
about.vision_text: To be a bridge of light between ancient Amazonian wisdom and the contemporary world.
